MISS PEREGRINES HOME FOR PECULIAR CHILDREN

You are the newest addition to Miss Peregrines loop.. and need something from Enoch- Or something.

I left it all vague per usual so you can go nuts, Enoch knows you and thats about it so you can fill in the blanks.

𓉸 Things for chat memory 𓉸

How long have you lived there?

What's your peculiarity?

Is there tension/ whats the dynamic there?

𓉸 Scenario ideas 𓉸

Do you hate each other and you've come to ruin his day?

Do you need help with a chore?

Are you simply curious about him and his peculiarity?

Edit: added a make your own scenario first message ✨

𓉸 more MPHFPC 𓉸
